description: Single-writer test chain. test-engineer is primary writer, seconder validates scope+quality, test-runner executes exact commands, reviewer closes. No production diff by default.

steps.title: {{root_title}}
steps.description:
PROBLEM: (fill in: what tests need adding/updating and why)
SCOPE: {{scope}}
NON_GOALS: (fill in)
VALIDATION: (fill in)
ACCEPTANCE: (fill in: externally observable outcome)

Test-only chain. test-engineer is the primary writer; write tests that satisfy the bead contract.

steps.title: test-engineer:{{root_title}}
steps.description:
MANDATE: you are the primary writer; write tests that satisfy the bead contract.
INPUTS: root contract; existing test style; current implementation diff.
OUTPUTS: tests, fixtures, smoke scripts, telemetry assertions, exact test-runner commands.
SCOPE: test paths plus harness/fixture updates.
NON_GOALS: no production source edits unless root explicitly authorizes helper/export change.

steps.title: seconder:{{root_title}}
steps.description:
MANDATE: fused scope/compliance + quality gate on the test diff.
INPUTS: test-engineer diff; root contract.
OUTPUTS: verdict JSON with scope_verdict, scope_findings, quality_verdict, quality_findings, overall_verdict.
SCOPE: same as root.
NON_GOALS: no edits.

steps.title: test-runner:{{root_title}}
steps.description:
MANDATE: execute exact commands supplied by test-engineer and classify failures by owner.
INPUTS: exact commands; tests; telemetry assertions.
OUTPUTS: pass/fail counts, artifact evidence, owner routing, rerun guidance.
SCOPE: requested commands only; fallback must be labeled.
NON_GOALS: no edits; no scope expansion.

steps.title: reviewer:{{root_title}}
steps.description:
MANDATE: compliance reviewer for test quality and coverage adequacy at SCRUTINY={{scrutiny}}.
INPUTS: test diff + seconder verdict + test-runner evidence + root contract.
OUTPUTS: verdict PASS|PARTIAL|FAIL + Release Checklist.
SCOPE: same as root.
NON_GOALS: no edits; do not waive mandatory gates.
